questions_to_answer: What specific types of user feedback are you looking to fetch? (e.g., comments, ratings)
How do you want the sentiment analysis to be conducted? Do you have a preferred method or tool?
What specific details do you want to include in the summary report?
Who should the report be emailed to in the marketing team? Are there specific recipients?
Is there a specific format or template for the summary report?
What time on Sundays should the data extraction process run?
